title: eragrostis aturensis
intro: Eragrostis aturensis, also known as Bhit, is a type of grass native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eragrostis aturensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Eragrostis aturensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
